text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Agnes Digital has a<n>number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't you think it's about time we<n>set a date?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We've seen Umas laugh, we've<n>seen Umas cry,
all about a million<n>times over by now. It's about
time<n>we build some new memories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What am I "talking about?!" I'm<n>talking about our
hot spring vacation!<n>Remember the coupon we
won at the<n>start of this year?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You said after we finished our third<n>year in the
Twinkle Series, we could<n>go and have a nonstop
Uma talk<n>session!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I haven't forgotten, of course. I<n>suppose this is
just about the perfect<n>time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
W-wait. That's it? You'll go? ...I<n>mean, I'm happy
and all, I just didn't<n>expect such an instant
"okay," but<n>um...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: B-but this is you we're talkingabout! I'm sure we'll have plenty ofstories to talk the night away. Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she's nervous<n>about this time,
but we end up taking<n>a train to the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Chatting... just the two ofus...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It'll be okay. Of course it'll be okay...<n>Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heeeeere's Digitan! Now let's get<n>this heated
Uma debate started!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I settle in for a chat with a<n>frighteningly passionate
Agnes<n>Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! That's so true! Hehe, the<n>clumsy way
Doto made her move..

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just thinking about it makes me...Drool... Which reminds me—
choice_data_list:
Um, don't you think it's about time we get some
food?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Food? We haven't moved onto<n>that topic
yet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh, wow! It's dinner timealready?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Time really flew by there, right?! It's<n>like it was
stolen from right under our<n>noses...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, Digital! Look at how you lost<n>yourself in
that chat...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was just worrying over<n>nothing. There
was never any reason<n>to be scared...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: After some hesitation, Agnes Digital<n>continues.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even though we have so much in<n>common, I
couldn't help but get a little<n>nervous. I mean, it's a
hot spring<n>trip...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like, what if we found out we're into<n>different
types of waifu, and then it<n>gets all awkward and
quiet?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I started worrying about<n>that, my
social skills went out the<n>window...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But still! Once we got yapping, it's like<n>I couldn't
stop! We're not even close<n>to covering
everything.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you know how rare and<n>miraculous this is?
How exhilarating?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never thought this day would come.<n>Y'know
what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Finally... I found someone I can really<n>relate to.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Agnes Digital was<n>worried we'd run
out of things to talk<n>about.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wh-wh-where is that line<n>from?! I don't
think I've seen that<n>movie!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Busting a line out like that like it's<n>nothing... Talk
about a silver tongue...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But if that's how you are, I get the<n>feeling we've
got a lot more to talk<n>about!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we resume our<n>enjoyable
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh... That was when I debuted,right? It def was! You remember,right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ew, ew, ew! Pleeease forget you<n>ever saw that!
That was a dark<n>moment, and some things aren't
meant to be remembered!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...When did the conversation switch<n>from
Umamusume to me? And why?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Why is the conversation still goingon like it's perfectly normal? Have Itransformed into some kinda socialbutterfly or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I totally have! For sure! I used to be a<n>superfan
that lived and breathed<n>Umamusume. It's the only
thing I<n>could talk about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now it's like... whatever. Anything<n>is okay.
And if you're okay with me<n>as I actually am...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh! I can't stop talking about<n>myself! There's
so much I wanna tell<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital's personal<n>stories start
flooding out as if from a<n>broken dam. She's never
opened up<n>like this before.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Agnes Digital and I have<n>formed an
irreplaceable bond during<n>this time together.
